name: button-icon
visual_summary: The Button-Icon component is a simple, rectangular button with an icon integrated into it. It's typically used in the UI to draw attention or trigger an action. It can come in different styles and sizes.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready button component with the following characteristics:

Name: button-icon
Description: The Button-Icon component is a simple, rectangular button with an icon integrated into it. It's typically used in the UI to draw attention or trigger an action. It can come in different styles and sizes.
Style: e.g. default, outlined, filled
Interactions: e.g. hover, clickable, tappable
Tags: button, icon, responsive, clickable

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
